Setup and export scripts consistently reference this path. Evidence document confirms this as authoritative data source for all preference queries.

privileged_info_summary: The optimize_highway_navigation task for Sygic Aura GPS Navigation requires configuring 8 settings across route planning and view preferences. The expected values are: avoid highways disabled (false), avoid toll roads disabled (false), avoid unpaved roads enabled (true), route computation set to Fastest ("1" vs "0" for Shortest), compass enabled (true), driving mode set to 2D ("0" vs "1" for 3D), 3D terrain disabled (false), and map font size set to bigger ("1" vs "0" for default). The setup state starts with all avoidances enabled (true), fastest/2D/compass/3D terrain/font all at their non-preferred values. Verification extracts values from the app's shared preferences XML file using root-escalated shell commands. Real test run on gemini-3-flash-preview confirmed verifier correctly identifies which settings match expected values. Data is from the actual Sygic Aura app (com.sygic.aura) running on Android emulator.
